subcodes.title: Words to Hannen, Latimer et al, spoken on 1912-08-01
subcodes.first_line: O God! Assist me with the hosts of the Supreme Concourse and make me firm and steadfast in the Covenant and Testament
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
